commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=0de005d88da638ec0f51f54533f34b4fe6f3ced8)
commands.review_summary:
The branch extends the Policy plugin with agent-scoped overlays, sandbox posture and ingress/channel access evidence/checks, focused tests, and policy documentation.

PR surface: Source +2498, Tests +2255, Docs +342. Total +5095 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature/config-conformance PR rather than a bug report. The review path is source and docs inspection against the PR head and current main.
commands.review_followup: Human/contributor follow-up is needed for real CLI proof and maintainer approval of the new Policy config contract; automation cannot provide the contributor's real setup proof.

target.title: Policy: add ingress channel conformance checks
target.author: giodl73-repo
